topic: NAD+ depletion: a core driver of cellular aging
caption: Did you know NAD+ depletion is a key driver of cellular aging? 💡 It affects our energy, brain function, and even lifespan. Here are 5 science-backed facts: 📚 NAD+ is crucial for cellular energy production. 🔋 It declines with age, affecting our physical and mental health. 🏋️‍♀️ Supplements like NR and NMN can boost NAD+ levels. 🌟 Exercise and calorie restriction also help. 🏃‍♂️ Save this so you don't lose it. Share with someone who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you! 🙏 #NAD #CellularAging #HealthTips #Wellness #ScienceBacked #AgingGracefully #CellularHealth #Longevity
